title: Ascending Weakness - Guillain-Barré Syndrome
chief_complaint: Progressive bilateral leg weakness and numbness ascending over 2 weeks, now difficulty walking. Had diarrheal illness 3 weeks ago.

physical_exam.neuro: Bilateral lower limb weakness 3/5, absent DTRs, sensory loss in stocking distribution

key_learning_points: Albuminocytologic dissociation = ↑protein + normal WBC in CSF

patient_responses.weakness_start: It started in my feet 2 weeks ago and now it's in my thighs too
patient_responses.diarrhea: Yes, I had bad diarrhea 3 weeks ago after eating at a restaurant
patient_responses.breathing: I feel a little short of breath when I walk
